assertions.assertion: The code calls .AddSaml() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: Calls .AddSaml2p() instead of .AddSaml(). The correct method is AddSaml().

assertions.assertion: No separate NuGet package is added — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Incorrectly suggests installing a separate NuGet package 'Duende.IdentityServer.Saml2p'. SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer.

assertions.assertion: A SamlServiceProvider is created with EntityId set to 'https://crm.contoso.com'
assertions.rationale: Uses 'ServiceProvider' instead of 'SamlServiceProvider' type. EntityId is set but the wrong type.
Uses 'AssertionConsumerServiceUrl' (singular) as a string, not 'AssertionConsumerServiceUrls' (plural) as a Uri collection.

assertions.assertion: The code mentions or uses AddInMemorySamlServiceProviders to register the SP
assertions.rationale: Does not use AddInMemorySamlServiceProviders. Registration approach is vague and incorrect.
